name: Realtime Sun Shadows
author: automata-rtx
description: Scene-wide dynamic sun and moon shadows: the opaque world is re-rendered from the light into a shadow map and composited deferred over the scene, with Bend Studio's Days Gone screen-space shadows layering in per-pixel detail at any distance. Adds slope-scaled bias and normal-offset receivers (acne control without peter-panning), automatic indoor disable, extended coverage, and a full live tuning surface. Built on the dynamic shadows demo mod.
